title: henriettea duckeana
intro: Henriettea duckeana, also known as Ducke's Henriettea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to the Amazon rainforest, where its leaves and stems are traditionally used for their medicinal properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to offer health benefits such as wound healing and protection against infections. Henriettea duckeana can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
